message:
bd-1q5.13: Enhanced tracing span assertions for golden-frame pipeline

Add 6 new tests (total 66) verifying tracing span hierarchy and
structured fields with the tracing feature enabled:
- present span with width/height/changes fields
- render.sync_bracket span with bracket_supported/fallback_used
- diff_compute span with width/height
- Full span hierarchy (present + sync_bracket + diff_compute + emit_diff)
- No ERROR events across all 5 terminal profiles
- WARN for mux profiles (screen, tmux) using cursor-hide fallback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
